title: Adds overlay.GenerateStructure in-order generate a permanent overlayfs dir structure.
body:
Following PR is being used by a downstream PR ( https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11170 ) on  (podman). 
Idea is to remove redundant code so that we can serve the use-cases for adding rootfs-overlay to podman.

comments.body: @rhatdan @nalind Would it be possible to have this in latest release as well.
Most likely not.  We are trying to get podman 3.3 out, with no new features.  Will add this to podman 3.4 and buildah 1.23.
Could you fixup your commit message to be based on current function name.
code LGTM but tests are unhappy
